Unshakable Juggernaut.name: 不屈重装泰坦 Unshakable Juggernaut
Unshakable Juggernaut.description:
你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为传奇。当你进行强韧豁免且掷出重度失败时，你改为失败。当你在对抗造成伤害的效果时强韧豁免失败，你所受到的伤害减半。

Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to legendary. When you roll a critical failure on a Fortitude save, you get a failure instead. When you fail a Fortitude save against an effect that deals damage, you halve the damage you take.

Gap Influenced.name: 裂隙影响者 Gap Influenced
Gap Influenced.description:
大断层以某种方式塑造了你，无论是通过持久的研究还是亲身经历。也许你出生于大断层期间，或凭借惊人的寿命、停滞技术，或时间旅行而亲历了它。

传统 秘术

悖论技能 社会

悖论法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{Daze}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yXD9uU8w8uFD2OBQ]{Delete}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kR5A0h2a9hY41wav]{Entropy Strike}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BilnTGuXrof9Dt9D]{Synaptic Pulse}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yrZA4k2VAqEP8xx7]{Repulsion}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

扭曲法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tZQpEnaFqwmU4AMZ]{Warp Presence}；进阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TAbOBvFU8dLzKiWw]{Forget}；高阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.YAa1StmuYC2QQ043]{Reality Wipe}

量子场 超自然的静电遮蔽了你的身形。对于你量子场内的生物，你处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}状态。若你量子场内的某个生物以一次攻击命中你，则直到你下个回合开始前，你对该生物失去此增益。

The Gap shaped you in some way, whether through enduring study or personal experience. Perhaps you were born during the Gap or lived through it thanks to an incredible lifespan, stasis technology, or time travel.

Tradition occult

Paradox Skill Society

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{Daze}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yXD9uU8w8uFD2OBQ]{Delete}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kR5A0h2a9hY41wav]{Entropy Strike}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.BilnTGuXrof9Dt9D]{Synaptic Pulse}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yrZA4k2VAqEP8xx7]{Repulsion}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MJx7DmjsWYzDZ3a4]{Phantasmagoria}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tZQpEnaFqwmU4AMZ]{Warp Presence}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.TAbOBvFU8dLzKiWw]{Forget}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.YAa1StmuYC2QQ043]{Reality Wipe}

Quantum Field Supernatural static obscures you from sight. You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to creatures within your quantum field. When a creature within your quantum field hits you with an attack, you lose this benefit against that creature until the start of your next turn.

Stellar Senses.name: 星界感官 Stellar Senses
Stellar Senses.description:
你经由细致的训练与磨炼出的感官，对周遭环境有了更敏锐的觉察。你的察觉熟练等级提升为大师。此外，你获得先攻检定 +2 的境况加值，使你在战斗中反应更快。若你拥有“Incredible Initiative”泛用专长，此加值改为 +3。

Your careful training and honed senses give you increased awareness of your surroundings. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, making you faster to react during combat. This bonus increases to +3 if you have the Incredible Initiative general feat.

Ghost.name: 幽灵 Ghost
Ghost.description:
你擅长潜入某个地点、完成目标，并在不被发现的情况下全身而退。你可能会使用潜行战术、掩护身份、伪装，或间谍科技。无论你是接近目标的刺客、收集敏感情报的间谍、打算骗过受害者的骗子，还是为下一票而踩点的窃贼，你都很擅长融入环境并避免引人注意。你受训于欺骗。你获得一个欺骗的技能专长。

漏洞利用：你很擅长出其不意地对付敌人。对于那些你处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{未察觉}状态的目标，你可以将@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准}作为一个自由动作使用。

强化漏洞利用：即使在与敌人交战后，你也能避免被侦测。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JXQaCPCd10sE0Gaa]{Ghost Tap}动作。

You specialize in slipping into a location, completing an objective, and extricating yourself without being discovered. You might use stealth tactics, cover identities, disguises, or spy tech. Whether you're an assassin getting close to your target, a spy gathering sensitive intelligence, a grifter out to dupe your mark, or a thief casing the joint for your next job, you're good at blending in and avoiding notice. You're trained in Deception. You gain a skill feat for Deception.

Exploit: You're adept at taking your foe by surprise. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} at targets you're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} by as a free action.

Enhanced Exploit: You avoid detection even after engaging your enemy. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JXQaCPCd10sE0Gaa]{Ghost Tap} action.

Warped Infinities.name: 扭曲无穷境 Warped Infinities
Warped Infinities.description:
你已经掌控了你的现实，以及其外的一千个现实。你的量子场半径变为100英尺。当你激活或维持你的量子场时，你可以通过排除任意数量的方格来调整其效果区域。

You've mastered your reality and a thousand realities beyond. The radius of your quantum field becomes 100 feet. When you activate or Sustain your quantum field, you can modify the area of its effect by excluding any number of squares.

Resilient Soul.name: 坚韧灵魂 Resilient Soul
Resilient Soul.description:
你与自己的联系及结契同伴之间的纽带会强化你的灵魂，使其不受疑虑侵扰。你的意志豁免熟练等级提升为大师。当你进行意志豁免检定获得成功时，改为获得大成功。

The links to your connection and your bonded companions bolster your soul against doubt. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Analyst.name: 分析员 Analyst
Analyst.description:
有一套隐藏的代码为物质宇宙与彼方的诸界提供动力，而通过专注你的 intellect，你可以接入其中并看见那些方程式。

传承 奥术

悖论技能 计算机

悖论法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.NkvRoN33RbDg3fl9]{Analyze Target}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tVTJS07cKDA5rNgc]{Sift the Sphere}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CptKtBneM7od45nc]{Subjective Reality}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rsZ5c0AUyywe5yoK]{Retrocognition}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

扭曲法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KOkGLXwOBAIlczzk]{Warp Probability}；先进：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vL7w8EtvZHlgRKlo]{Alternate Outcome}；高等：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.v8JA4sG2tsVP2gOM]{Quantum Analysis}

量子场 当你进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}时，你可以将结果应用于你量子场内两个相关的生物、危害、无人持用的物体和效果。每当你维持你的量子场时，你都可以对你量子场内的一个目标进行Seek或Recall Knowledge，作为一个自由动作。

There's a hidden code that powers the Universe and realms beyond, and by focusing your intellect, you can tap into it and see the equations.

Tradition arcane

Paradox Skill Computers

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.NkvRoN33RbDg3fl9]{Analyze Target}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tVTJS07cKDA5rNgc]{Sift the Sphere}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CptKtBneM7od45nc]{Subjective Reality}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rsZ5c0AUyywe5yoK]{Retrocognition}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KOkGLXwOBAIlczzk]{Warp Probability}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vL7w8EtvZHlgRKlo]{Alternate Outcome}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.v8JA4sG2tsVP2gOM]{Quantum Analysis}

Quantum Field When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}, you can apply the result against two related creatures, hazards, unattended objects, and effects in your quantum field. Whenever you Sustain your quantum field, you can Seek or Recall Knowledge against a target in your quantum field as a free action.

Quantum Will.name: 量子意志 Quantum Will
Quantum Will.description:
你在研习或旅行中积累的强烈经历强化了你的精神韧性。你的意志豁免熟练等级提升为大师。当你进行意志豁免检定获得成功时，改为获得大成功。

The intense experiences you've accumulated through your studies or travels have strengthened your mental fortitude. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Urban Operator.name: 都市特勤干员 Urban Operator
Urban Operator.description:
你习惯了城市环境，能够在拥挤的都市景观中迅速移动。你无视城市环境中的困难地形，而城市环境造成的高等困难地形对你而言仅视为困难地形。

You are accustomed to urban environments and can move swiftly through a crowded cityscape. You ignore difficult terrain in urban environments, and greater difficult terrain from urban environments is only difficult terrain for you.

Close Quarters.name: 贴身共战 Close Quarters
Close Quarters.description:
虽然你受过运用重型武器所需的训练，但你认为在敌人逼近时保留一个后备武器很重要。你可能是一名经验丰富的维斯卡里姆士兵，熟知如何使用多什科，也可能是宗-莎琳的虔诚信徒，用痛苦长戟施展圣洁怒火。使用重型近战武器发动的打击，也能像你发射旋转激光炮或导弹发射器时一样有效地阻碍敌人。

只要你正持握一把双手近战武器，你就满足需要区域武器的士兵专长的要求。使用士兵专长时，你可以将所持握的任意双手近战武器视为具有 area（burst 5 feet），从而能以该武器进行区域射击，并将爆发的中心设在你所占据方格的一个角上，且你不受以该武器发动的攻击影响。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{Whirling Swipe} 专长。

While you have the necessary training to employ heavy weapons, you believe it's important to keep a backup for when foes get too close. You might be a veteran Veskarium trooper who knows their way around a doshko or a devotee of Zon-Shelyn dealing holy wrath with a painglaive. Blows with heavy close combat weapons hinder your foes just as effectively as when you fire a rotolaser or a missile launcher.

As long as you're wielding a two-handed melee weapon, you meet the requirements for soldier feats that require an area weapon. When using a soldier feat, you can treat any two-handed melee weapon you're wielding as having the area (burst 5 feet), allowing you to area fire with the weapon centering the burst on a corner of a square you occupy, and you are unaffected by attacks with that weapon. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xND8wnEdnGSq84kn]{Whirling Swipe} feat.

Legendary Armor.name: 传奇护甲 Legendary Armor
Legendary Armor.description:
你对护甲的精通无与伦比。你在轻甲、中甲、重甲以及无甲防御上的熟练等级提升至传奇。

Your skill with armor is unparalleled. Your proficiency ranks for light armor, medium armor, heavy armor, and unarmored defense increase to legendary.

Connection.name: 连接 Connection
Connection.description:
所有秘术师都与某种太空力量有着超自然连接，这种力量赋予他们魔法能力。你这种连接的确切本质可能千差万别——你可能崇拜某位神祇或某个神系，体现某种形而上学概念，成为自然之怒的传导者，或是其他某种存在。即使是拥有相同连接的秘术师，也可能会对其力量来源有不同的理解。在1级时，选择你的连接。你所选择的连接决定了你施放的法术类型，以及你从哪个法术传统中选择法术、你额外受训的技能、你学会的顿悟，以及一种和鸣；这种和鸣通常会在你用活力网络对生物施加治疗术时，赋予其特殊增益。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{阿卡西}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{元素}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{治疗}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{节律}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{暗影}

All mystics have a supernatural connection with a cosmic force that grants magical powers. The exact nature of your connection can vary widely—you might worship a god or pantheon, embody a metaphysical concept, become a conduit for nature's wrath, or something else. Even mystics who share the same connection might interpret the source of their powers differently. At 1st level, choose your connection. Your chosen connection determines the type of spells you cast and the spell tradition you choose spells from, your additional trained skill, the epiphanies you learn, and a harmony that usually grants creatures a special benefit when you heal them with your vitality network.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.fM1vlupLq9Zlyt7C]{Akashic}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.AurhNoZmNNhHktx6]{Elemental}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.XV8C2ASALC65G5MH]{Healing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jV9LIUswOPkVRC49]{Rhythm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.kvmpnKMVw4wwGk8c]{Shadow}

Through Desperate Times.name: 艰难时世之中 Through Desperate Times
Through Desperate Times.description:
你会在艰难时期挺身而出担任领导者。你可能经历过创伤性事件，也许是在一场哗变中逃离了一艘海盗船，或者你曾参加过某场臭名昭著的战役。你的盟友信任你的直觉，因为他们知道你会保护他们的安全。

领导技能 医疗

领导特长 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.wYerMk6F1RZb0Fwt]{Battle Medicine} 作为奖励专长。

领导训令 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oRdDgSC3RVpNgisd]{Keep on Keeping On!}

You step up to lead during difficult times. You might have experienced a traumatic event, perhaps escaping a pirate ship during a mutiny, or you fought in some notorious battle. Your allies trust your instincts, knowing you'll keep them safe.

Leadership Skill Medicine

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.wYerMk6F1RZb0Fwt]{Battle Medicine} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oRdDgSC3RVpNgisd]{Keep on Keeping On!}

Light Armor Expertise.name: 轻甲专家 Light Armor Expertise
Light Armor Expertise.description: 你学会了如何在穿着轻甲或不穿甲时闪避。你在轻甲以及无甲防御上的熟练度提升至专家。

Expert Spellcaster.name: 专家施法者 Expert Spellcaster
Expert Spellcaster.description:
秘学者 你与自身联结建立了更强大的纽带。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为专家。

织巫者 长期的魔法练习提升了你的能力。你的职业DC、法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为专家。

Mystic You've formed a more powerful bond with your connection. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increase to expert.

Witchwarper Extended practice of magic has improved your capabilities. Your proficiency ranks for class DC, spell attack modifier, and spell DC increase to expert.

Walking Armory.name: 步行军械库 Walking Armory
Walking Armory.description:
你的耐力训练让你能够携带大量重型装备。在判定你穿戴护甲时所使用的力量时，你可以改为选择使用你的体质调整值。如果你已经满足所穿戴护甲的力量需求，则将该护甲的负重降低 1（最低降至 1）。

此外，你在变为负载前可携带的负重提高等同于你体质调整值的一半（向上取整）。你的最大可携带负重提高等同于你的体质调整值。

Your endurance training empowers you to carry a load of heavy equipment. When determining your Strength for using armor, you can instead choose to use your Constitution modifier. If you already meet the Strength requirement for the armor you're wearing, reduce that armor's Bulk by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

In addition, increase the amount of Bulk you can carry before becoming encumbered by half your Constitution modifier rounded up. Increase your maximum carried Bulk by your Constitution modifier.

Operative Resilience.name: 特工韧性 Operative Resilience
Operative Resilience.description:
你拥有强健的体魄。你的强韧豁免的熟练等级提升为专家。

You have a hardy physique. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Inscrutable.name: 不可解 Inscrutable
Inscrutable.description:
你的敌人几乎不可能看穿你的阴谋或你的长期计划。当一个生物针对你进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{察觉动机}的察觉检定，或进行“收集信息”或关于你秘密的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}技能检定，并获得大成功或成功时，它们改为获得失败。当你针对会读取或揭露你的思想、情绪或意图的效果或能力进行豁免检定，并获得大失败或失败时，你改为获得成功。

It's nigh impossible for your enemies to unravel your schemes or your long-term plans. When a creature rolls a critical success or success on a Perception check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} against you, or on a skill check to Gather Information or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your secrets, they get a failure instead. When you roll a critical failure or failure on a saving throw against an effect or ability that would read or reveal your thoughts, emotions, or intentions, you get a success instead.

Tactician.name: 战术家 Tactician
Tactician.description:
当你没有在指挥盟友时，你会专注于局势不断变化的情况，做好反应准备。在你的每个回合结束时，你获得1个额外反应，你可以在你下个回合开始前将其用于任何特使反应。

When you aren't directing allies, you focus on a situation's shifting circumstances, readying to react. At the end of each of your turns, you gain one additional reaction, which you can use before the beginning of your next turn for any envoy reaction.

Perfect Harmony.name: 完美和谐 Perfect Harmony
Perfect Harmony.description:
你发现了自身连结的终极真理，以及它作为宇宙基石所扮演的角色。你领悟了所选连结的完美和谐。

You discover the ultimate truth of your connection and its role as a foundation of the cosmos. You learn your chosen connection's perfect harmony.

Leader's Confidence.name: 领袖的自信 Leader's Confidence
Leader's Confidence.description:
无论你是冷静沉着，还是咬紧牙关强作镇定，你都不会让你的团队看到你失去冷静。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.gZr207z8Q7AuH2RT]{振作起来！}使节训令。

Whether you're calm and collected or projecting confidence through gritted teeth, you don't let your team see you lose your cool. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.gZr207z8Q7AuH2RT]{Steel Yourselves!} envoy directive.

Adaptive Talent.name: 适应性天赋 Adaptive Talent
Adaptive Talent.description:
你思维敏捷且适应力强，几乎不需要多少练习或训练就能掌握新的技能与才能。在你每日准备期间，选择一个你满足前提条件的技能专长。你获得该技能专长，直到你再次进行准备为止。由于你是临时拥有此专长，因此不能将它作为永久角色选项的前提条件。你可以将此能力用于那些会暂时让你获得其他能力的效果，例如选择 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} 来暂时学会一种新语言。

随着你的使节等级提高，你适应新情况的能力也会随之增强。在9级和15级时，以这种方式获得的技能专长数量各增加1个。你可以将通过适应天赋临时获得的专长，作为通过适应天赋临时获得其他专长的前提条件，但你仍然不能将它们作为永久角色选项的前提条件。

You're quick thinking and adaptable, capable of picking up new skills and talents with little practice or training. During your daily preparations, select one skill feat that you meet the prerequisites for. You gain this skill feat until you prepare again. Since you have this feat temporarily, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a permanent character option. You can use this for effects that temporarily give you access to other abilities, such as taking @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} to temporarily learn a new language.

As your envoy level increases, so does your ability to adapt to new situations. At 9th level and 15th level, increase the number of skill feats you gain this way by 1. You can use feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent as a prerequisite for other feats that you temporarily gain through adaptive talent, but you still can't use them as prerequisites for permanent character options.

Elemental.name: 元素 Elemental
Elemental.description:
你引导汇聚成物质宇宙及其中万物的太初元素原始之力。你也许与一种或多种元素有着强烈的亲和力，或者你曾造访某个元素位面，并在旅途中受到了触动。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 通用专长。

传统 原始

连接技能 自然

连接法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.5y70IWhVV6bVjC9N]{Recharge Weapon}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.fI20AVwOzJMHXRdo]{Levitate}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{Wall of Fire}*；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1K6AYGisvo9gqdhs]{Elemental Form}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.xS4bqHnbodCwjpqI]{Promession}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kGas0LdEAR1WjLGZ]{Absolute Zero}*；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.x7SPrsRxGb2Vy2nu]{Earthquake}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jrBa9deU2ULFWvSl]{Falling Stars}

*将元素特征和伤害类型替换为你处于激活状态的元素武器或元素屏障顿悟法术的特征和伤害类型。

顿悟法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d5dmu4HZ3YyrwcaF]{Elemental Weapon}；先进：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.5apI8Yamauo02VYR]{Elemental Barrier}；高等：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.DZOjyZBZUrzkw5q2]{Elemental Nova}

和谐 当你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}时，选择一种元素特征：气、地、火、金、水或木。如果你有一个或多个元素顿悟处于激活状态，你必须选择你在施放那些法术时所选定的元素特征。直到其下个回合结束时，目标的下一次打击造成基于所选特征的伤害（由你选择），而非其通常的伤害类型：气对应电击或音波，地对应钝击或穿刺，金对应强酸或挥砍，火对应火焰，水对应钝击或寒冷，木对应穿刺或毒素。

完美和谐 在你的每日准备期间，选择一种元素特征（如和谐中所列）。你获得等同于你等级一半的抗性，分别对应你所选元素关联的两种伤害类型。如果你选择了火，你还额外获得寒冷抗性。每当你以 Transfer Vitality 治疗一名联结盟友时，目标获得这些抗性，直到你下个回合开始。

You channel the raw power of the primordial elements that converge to create the Universe and everything in it. You might have a strong affinity with one or more elements, or maybe you visited one of the elemental planes and were touched by the journey. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} general feat.

Tradition primal

Connection Skill Nature

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.5y70IWhVV6bVjC9N]{Recharge Weapon}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7P4eBdqWcgQJAFCa]{Shifting Surge}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]{Resist Energy}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.fI20AVwOzJMHXRdo]{Levitate}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{Wall of Fire}*; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1K6AYGisvo9gqdhs]{Elemental Form}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.xS4bqHnbodCwjpqI]{Promession}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kGas0LdEAR1WjLGZ]{Absolute Zero}*; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.x7SPrsRxGb2Vy2nu]{Earthquake}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.jrBa9deU2ULFWvSl]{Falling Stars}

*Replace the elemental trait and damage type with the trait and damage type of your active elemental weapon or elemental barrier epiphany spells.

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d5dmu4HZ3YyrwcaF]{Elemental Weapon}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.5apI8Yamauo02VYR]{Elemental Barrier}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.DZOjyZBZUrzkw5q2]{Elemental Nova}

Harmony When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}, choose an elemental trait: air, earth, fire, metal, water, or wood. If one or more of your elemental epiphanies are active, you must select the elemental trait you chose as part of casting those spells. Until the end of their next turn, the target's next Strike deals damage based on the chosen trait (your choice), rather than its typical damage type: electricity or sonic for air, bludgeoning or piercing for earth, acid or slashing for metal, fire for fire, bludgeoning or cold for water, or piercing or poison for wood.

Perfect Harmony During your daily preparations, choose an elemental trait (as listed in harmony). You gain resistance equal to half your level to both damage types associated with the element you selected. If you chose fire, you additionally gain resistance to cold. Whenever you heal a bonded ally with Transfer Vitality, the target gains these resistances until the beginning of your next turn.

Weapon Expertise.name: 武器专家 Weapon Expertise
Weapon Expertise.description:
使节 你已经学会了几招武器运用技巧。你对简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。每当你攻击你施展“振作起来！”的目标时，你便获得你所有专家熟练武器的重击专精效果。

秘者 你用基础武器赢得战斗。你对简易武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。

巫术扭曲者 你对常规武器有了更广泛的理解，以强化你不同寻常的施法能力。你对简易武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy You've learned a few tricks with your weapons. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increase to expert. Whenever you attack the target of your Get 'Em!, you gain access to the critical specialization effects of all weapons for which you have expert proficiency.

Mystic You win battles with basic weapons. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Witchwarper You've gained a broader understanding of conventional weaponry to augment your unconventional spellcasting. Your proficiency rank for simple weapons and unarmed attacks increases to expert.

Stellar Resilience.name: 星辰韧性 Stellar Resilience
Stellar Resilience.description:
星辰能量如同不可阻挡的浪潮流遍你的整个存在，同时强化你的身体与心智。你在强韧豁免上的熟练等级提升为专家。当你在对抗精神或失能效果的强韧或意志豁免检定中获得成功时，你可以以自由动作 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{调谐}。

Stellar energy flows throughout your entire being like an unstoppable tidal wave, strengthening both body and mind. Your proficiency rank in Fortitude saves increases to expert. When you roll a success on a Fortitude or Will save against a mental or incapacitation effect, you can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} as a free action.

Weapon Specialization.name: 武器专精 Weapon Specialization
Weapon Specialization.description:
外交官、特工、异变巫师 你已经学会如何用你最擅长的武器造成更严重的伤害。对于你熟练等级为专家的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加 2 点。如果你的熟练等级为大师，则该伤害增加变为 3 点；如果为传奇，则变为 4 点。

秘学者 你已经学会如何用你的武器保护自己和盟友。对于你熟练等级为专家的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加 2 点。如果你的熟练等级为大师，则该伤害增加变为 3 点；如果为传奇，则变为 4 点。

至日者 你已经学会如何用你最常练习的武器造成更严重的伤害。对于你熟练等级为专家的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加 2 点。如果你的熟练等级为大师，则该伤害增加变为 3 点；如果为传奇，则变为 4 点。

士兵 你会用你最擅长的武器造成更严重的伤害。对于你熟练等级为专家的武器和徒手攻击，你造成的伤害额外增加 2 点。如果你的熟练等级为大师，则该伤害增加变为 3 点；如果为传奇，则变为 4 点。

Envoy, Operative, Witchwarper You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 damage if you're a master, and 4 damage if you're legendary.

Mystic You've learned to protect yourself and your allies with your weapons. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master and 4 if you're legendary.

Solarian You've learned how to inflict greater injuries with the weapons you've practiced with most. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Soldier You inflict greater injuries with the weapons you know best. You deal 2 additional damage with weapons and unarmed attacks in which you're an expert. This damage increases to 3 if you're a master, and 4 if you're legendary.

Greater Resolve.name: 高等决心 Greater Resolve
Greater Resolve.description:
你的雄心与固执赋予你心智上的韧性。你的意志豁免熟练等级提升至传奇。若你进行意志豁免时掷出成功，则改为获得重度成功。若你进行意志豁免时掷出重度失败，则改为获得失败。若你对造成伤害的效果进行意志豁免时失败，则你承受一半伤害。

Your ambition and stubbornness grant you mental resiliency. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to legendary. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead. When you roll a critical failure on a Will save, you get a failure instead. When you fail a Will save against a damaging effect, you take half damage.

Initial Epiphany.name: 初始顿悟 Initial Epiphany
Initial Epiphany.description:
你发现了自己连结的根本真理。你学会所选连结的初始顿悟法术。顿悟法术是一类专注法术。施放专注法术需要消耗 1 点专注点，而你起始拥有一个包含 1 点专注点的专注池。你会在每日准备期间补满专注池，并且你可以通过花费 10 分钟使用重聚专注活动，与自己的羁绊盟友共度时光，或以其他方式沉思自己连结的本质，来恢复 1 点专注点。

专注法术会像戏法一样，自动强化至你等级的一半（向上取整）。专注法术不需要法术位，而且你也不能使用法术位来施放它们。选取专长可以让你获得更多专注法术，并增加专注池的容量，不过你的专注池所能容纳的专注点永远不能超过 3 点。

You discover the basic truth of your connection. You learn your chosen connection's initial epiphany spell. Epiphany spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to spend time with your bonded allies or otherwise ponder the nature of your connection.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Operative Expertise.name: 特工专精 Operative Expertise
Operative Expertise.description:
你的技巧现在更难以抵抗。你的特工职业 DC 的熟练等级提升为专家。

Your techniques are now harder to resist. Your proficiency rank for your operative class DC increases to expert.

Soldier Expertise.name: 战士专精 Soldier Expertise
Soldier Expertise.description:
你施展区域攻击并运用装备的能力有所提升。你的士兵职业 DC 熟练等级提升为专家。

Your ability to unleash area attacks and utilize your equipment improves. Your proficiency rank for your soldier class DC increases to expert.

Core Memories.name: 核心记忆 Core Memories
Core Memories.description:
无论你去往何处旅行，珍贵的记忆都会让你与现实保持连系。无论你的记忆具有何种性质、数量多少，你都可以专注于它们，以提醒自己：在无限可能的现实之中，对你影响最大的始终是你自己的现实。

锚定益处 在你每日准备期间，选择一项你已受训的技能。你获得该技能的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance}。如果你在该技能上达到专家，且该技能拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} 动作，则你获得该技能的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.H3I2X0f7v4EzwxuN]{Automatic Knowledge}。

锚定效果 使你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} 状况减少 1。你每轮只能从此受益一次。

No matter where you travel, precious memories keep you tethered to reality. Whatever the nature and number of your memories, you can focus on them to remind yourself which of the infinite possible realities impacts you the most: your own.

Anchor Benefit During your daily preparations, choose a skill you're trained in. You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance} in that skill. If you're expert in that skill, and the skill has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action, you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.H3I2X0f7v4EzwxuN]{Automatic Knowledge} in that skill.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition by 1. You can only benefit from this once per round.

Striker.name: 打击者 Striker
Striker.description:
你专精于徒手战斗，比起枪械，你更喜欢用拳头或轻型近战武器作战。无论你是为刺激而活的亡命之徒、喜欢炫技的武术家，还是以亲手了结目标的刺客，你都会主动逼近敌人，并将自己的身体化为武器。你受训于运动学。你获得一个运动学的技能专长。

漏洞利用：你对具有灵巧或娴熟特征的单手近战武器与徒手攻击拥有专家熟练，而非对军用枪械拥有专家熟练。每当你提升军用枪械的熟练时，你改为提升单手灵巧与娴熟近战武器、灵巧与娴熟徒手攻击，以及简易枪械的熟练。

此外，当你进行瞄准时，你可以使用具有灵巧或娴熟特征的单手近战武器或徒手攻击进行瞄准，并将其收益应用于该武器或攻击，而非远程武器。为满足特工专长的需求时，将任何具有灵巧或娴熟特征的单手近战武器或徒手攻击视为枪械。你可以不以特工专长进行一次远程打击，改为以具有灵巧或娴熟特征的单手近战武器或徒手攻击进行一次打击。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eBxEPfTafaJaK4Kf]{Reactive Step} 反应。

强化漏洞利用：你发现自己能够压倒那些你研究过的敌人。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.m4IGOcYt8TBpYD8T]{Overwhelming Strike} 自由动作。

You specialize in hand-to-hand combat and prefer to fight with your fists or lightweight melee weapons, rather than guns. Whether you're a daredevil who lives for the thrill, a martial artist who likes to show off, or an assassin who kills with a personal touch, you take the fight to your foes and use your body as a weapon. You're trained in Athletics. You gain a skill feat for Athletics.

Exploit: You have expert proficiency with one-handed melee weapons and unarmed attacks with the agile or finesse traits instead of with martial guns. Whenever you increase your proficiency with martial guns, you instead increase your proficiency with one-handed agile and finesse melee weapons, agile and finesse unarmed attacks, and simple guns.

In addition, when you Aim, you can Aim with and apply the benefits to a one-handed melee weapon or unarmed attack with the agile or finesse trait rather than with a ranged weapon. Treat any one-handed melee weapon or unarmed attack with the agile or finesse trait as a gun for purposes of meeting the requirements of operative feats. Instead of making a ranged Strike with an operative feat, you can make a Strike with an one-handed melee weapon or unarmed attack with the agile or finesse trait.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eBxEPfTafaJaK4Kf]{Reactive Step} reaction.

Enhanced Exploit: You find yourself able to overwhelm foes that you study. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.m4IGOcYt8TBpYD8T]{Overwhelming Strike} free action.

Erudite Warrior.name: 博学战士 Erudite Warrior
Erudite Warrior.description:
你意识到，并非每种情况都该用枪来解决。你既是知识分子，也是战士，能够以合乎逻辑的方式解决问题，并学习有关银河系的知识。你通过正规教育或自主学习来保持思维敏锐。当逻辑失效时，你也总是准备好回归自己的战斗训练。

在外交或社群中选择一项。你在所选技能以及一项自选知识技能上成为受训。当你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.vt4e3FdwvI3hNkEf]{Armor Expertise} 时，你在外交或社群（以你所选者为准）以及你所选的知识技能上的熟练等级提升为专家。当你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Gs1MRPZ3s3TXwEsX]{Armor Mastery} 时，这会提升为大师熟练；当你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5uMdhwOXbamPbNHA]{Legendary Armor} 时，则提升为传奇熟练。你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TBLHu4RhvhPrKid6]{Oppressive Presence} 动作。

You realize that not every situation should be solved with a gun. You're an intellectual as well as a warrior, solving problems logically and learning about the galaxy. You keep your mind sharp with formal education or self-guided study. When logic breaks down, you're always ready to fall back on your combat training.

Choose either Diplomacy or Society. You become trained in the chosen skill and one Lore skill of your choice. When you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.vt4e3FdwvI3hNkEf]{Armor Expertise}, you gain expert proficiency in Diplomacy or Society (whichever you selected) and the Lore skill you selected. This increases to master proficiency when you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Gs1MRPZ3s3TXwEsX]{Armor Mastery}, and to legendary proficiency when you gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5uMdhwOXbamPbNHA]{Legendary Armor}. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TBLHu4RhvhPrKid6]{Oppressive Presence} action.

Leadership Style.name: 领导风格 Leadership Style
Leadership Style.description:
无论这是你的天性使然，还是你经过了相关训练，你都已发展出一种领导他人的个人风格。在1级时，选择一种领导风格。你在所标明的领导技能上成为受训，你获得所标明的领导特长，并知晓相关联的领导训令。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{身先士卒}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{暗影中指挥}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{火力全开}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{聚光灯下}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{信息圈指挥官}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{共渡危局}

Whether it comes naturally, or you trained for it, you've developed a personal style of leading others. At 1st level, select a leadership style. You become trained in the indicated leadership skill, you gain the indicated leadership perk, and know the associated leadership directive.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u2dy5FMDv30UH8HC]{From the Front}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.KEoTccJlfKzMk19l]{From the Shadows}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.jaGIV3t7G07F0qda]{Guns Blazing}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.RIUhD5eldHzBsFIe]{In the Spotlight}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.GTmdHGLcuc11Bizi]{Infosphere Director}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.6cFaxZ4aAhuUbnwi]{Through Desperate Times}

Tactical Barrage.name: 战术弹幕 Tactical Barrage
Tactical Barrage.description:
你对你的目标发动一连串毁灭性的攻击。你在本回合中对你的目标进行攻击时，多重攻击减值在你的第二次攻击时为 –3（使用灵巧武器时为 –2），而非 –5；在你的第三次或后续攻击时为 –6（使用灵巧武器时为 –4），而非 –10。

You unleash a devastating barrage of attacks upon your mark. Your multiple attack penalty for attacks against your mark is –3 (–2 with an agile weapon) on your second attack of the turn instead of –5, and –6 (–4 with an agile weapon) on your third or subsequent attack of the turn, instead of –10.

Infosphere Director.name: 信息圈总监 Infosphere Director
Infosphere Director.description:
你掌控信息的流动，在战斗期间或规划下一次任务时都扮演着关键角色。你可能会通过通讯设备或数据板下达指令，或使用心灵感应进行交流。

领导技能 计算机

领导专长 你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{Digital Diversion}作为额外专长。

领导训令 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.4oIErnhDm0qCCpxs]{Digital Assessment!}

You control the flow of information, playing a critical role during a battle or while planning your next mission. You might give commands through a comm unit or datapad or using telepathic communication.

Leadership Skill Computers

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.0ZNErs9RICfOw1Nf]{Digital Diversion} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.4oIErnhDm0qCCpxs]{Digital Assessment!}

Armor Mastery.name: 护甲大师 Armor Mastery
Armor Mastery.description:
Solarian 你能在几乎任何情况下灵巧地保护自己。你在轻甲、中甲和无甲防御上的熟练等级提升为大师。

Soldier 你运用护甲的技巧进一步提升。你在轻甲、中甲、重甲和无甲防御上的熟练等级提升为大师。

Solarian You deftly protect yourself in almost any situation. Your proficiency ranks for light armor, medium armor, and unarmored defense increase to master.

Soldier Your skill with armor further improves. Your proficiency ranks for light armor, medium armor, heavy armor, and unarmored defense increase to master.

Skirmisher.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
你专精于需要在拥挤或狭窄空间中行动的近距离任务，例如在建筑物或载具内部、狭窄的小巷中，或繁忙的市中心街道上。无论你是劫匪、保镖、刺客，还是城市雇佣兵，你都偏好手枪，并且能在狭小空间中高效使用它们。你受训于特技。你获得一个特技的技能专长。

弱点利用：你受过训练，能够使用手枪进行近身战斗。你使用单手远程武器进行的远程打击不会触发由远程攻击所触发的反应。

强化弱点利用：你的近距离射击尤其致命。当你使用单手远程武器对相邻敌人进行一次成功的打击时，你改为如下计算伤害：此次攻击的武器伤害骰中，出目最低的那颗视为获得最大结果。到17级时，出目最低的两颗伤害骰都视为获得最大结果。

You specialize in close-quarters missions that require you to operate in crowded or tight spaces, such as inside buildings or vehicles, down narrow alleys, or in busy downtown streets. Whether you're a mugger, bodyguard, assassin, or urban mercenary, you favor pistols and can use them efficiently in tight spaces. You're trained in Acrobatics. You gain a skill feat for Acrobatics.

Exploit: You're trained to fight in close combat using pistols. Your ranged Strikes with one-handed ranged weapons don't trigger reactions that are triggered by a ranged attack.

Enhanced Exploit: Your point-blank shots are particularly deadly. When you make a successful Strike against an adjacent enemy with a one-handed ranged weapon, you calculate the damage as if the lowest-rolled weapon damage die for the attack had the maximum result instead. At 17th level, the two lowest-rolled damage dice increase to the maximum result.

Mystic Spellcasting.name: 秘能施法 Mystic Spellcasting
Mystic Spellcasting.description:
你是一名施法者，可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为秘术师，当你施放法术时，你可能会吟诵祈祷词，或哼唱一首受你顿悟启发的歌曲；你也可能以顺应你的连接网络流动的模式做出手势或舞蹈；你还可能让你与结契盟友之间流动的缕缕能量伴随你的施法。

每天，你最多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过“法术 repertoire”职业特性来习得这些法术。你每天能够施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为秘术师的等级提升，你每天可施放的法术数量会增加，你能够施放的最高法术环阶也会提高，如“秘术师每日法术”表所示。

你的某些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击，以确定它们有多有效；或者让你的敌人对抗你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是尝试一次豁免检定）。由于你的关键属性是感知，你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC使用你的感知调整值。

法术升阶

当你获得2环及以上的法术位时，你可以用较低环阶法术的更强版本来填充这些法术位。这会将该法术的环阶提高到与法术位相同。你必须在你的法术 repertoire 中拥有目标环阶的该法术，才能将其升阶至该环阶。许多法术在升阶到特定环阶时会获得特定强化。“招牌法术”职业特性让你能够自由升阶某些法术。

戏法

你的部分法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不使用法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天任意次数。戏法会自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）——这通常等于你拥有的最高秘术师法术位环阶。例如，作为1级秘术师，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级秘术师，你的戏法是3环法术。

You are a spellcaster and can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a mystic, when you cast spells, you might intone a prayer or hum a song inspired by your epiphanies, you might gesture or dance in patterns that follow the flow of your connection's network, and you might accompany your spellcasting with wisps of energy flowing between you and your bonded allies.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a mystic, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast, as shown on the Mystic Spells per Day table.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Since your key attribute is Wisdom, your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Wisdom modifier.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks. The signature spells class feature lets you heighten certain spells freely.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of mystic spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level mystic, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level mystic, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Solarian Expertise.name: 星阳武者专精 Solarian Expertise
Solarian Expertise.description:
你操纵恒星之力的能力提升了。你的日耀者职业 DC 的熟练等级提升为专家。

Your ability to manipulate stellar forces has improved. Your proficiency rank for your solarian class DC increases to expert.

From the Shadows.name: 自阴影中 From the Shadows
From the Shadows.description:
你更喜欢以微妙的方式指挥盟友，而不引起敌人太多注意。你可能会悄悄跟在你的护卫身后，或在安全距离外为团队提供支援。

领导技能 潜行

领导特长 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance (Stealth)} 作为奖励专长。

领导训令 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.8mIyIlniGH2SMO6B]{协同伏击！}

You prefer to direct your allies in subtle ways, without drawing much attention from foes. You might sneak in behind your bodyguards or support your team from a safe distance.

Leadership Skill Stealth

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.W6Gl9ePmItfDHji0]{Assurance (Stealth)} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.8mIyIlniGH2SMO6B]{Coordinated Ambush!}

Stellar Partition.name: 星辰分界 Stellar Partition
Stellar Partition.description:
你的太阳光环会保护你免受精神侵扰。你对意志豁免的熟练等级提升为大师。当你在对抗精神或失能效果的意志豁免中获得成功时，你改为获得大成功。

Your solar nimbus protects you against mental intrusions. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save against a mental or incapacitation effect, you get a critical success instead.

Hidden Agenda.name: 隐藏议程 Hidden Agenda
Hidden Agenda.description:
你已经成了掩饰自己阴谋诡计的专家。当一个生物对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{判断动机} 并掷出重度成功，或进行一次技能检定来 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{收集情报} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 以探知你的秘密时，它们改为获得成功。当你对某个会读取或揭露你的思想、情感或意图的效果或能力进行豁免检定时掷出重度失败时，无论是魔法方式还是其他方式，你改为获得失败。

You've become an expert at veiling your schemes. When a creature rolls a critical success to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive} against you, or a skill check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.plBGdZhqq5JBl1D8]{Gather Information} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about your secrets, they get a success instead. When you roll a critical failure on a saving throw against an effect or ability that would read or reveal your thoughts, emotions, or intentions, magically or otherwise, you get a failure instead.

Specialized Skill Set.name: 专门化技能组合 Specialized Skill Set
Specialized Skill Set.description:
在第3级、第7级和第15级时，你获得一个技能专长。该专长必须属于你特工专精所对应的受训技能。

At 3rd level, 7th level, and 15th level, you gain a skill feat. This feat must be for the trained skill from your operative's specialization.

Stellar Paragon.name: 星辰完美型 Stellar Paragon
Stellar Paragon.description:
你是太阳武者中的完美典范，能够将星辰之力塑造成强大的武器，随心所欲地操控。你的太阳耀斑和太阳武器的熟练等级提升至传奇。

You're a paragon among solarians, capable of shaping stellar forces into powerful weapons that bend to your will. Your proficiency ranks for your solar flare and solar weapon increase to legendary.

Greater Weapon Specialization.name: 高等武器专精 Greater Weapon Specialization
Greater Weapon Specialization.description: 你源自武器专精职业特性的伤害，在武器熟练度至专家的武器和无武装攻击上提升至4，若熟练度至大师则为6，若熟练度为传奇则为8。

Legendary Improvisation.name: 传奇即兴发挥 Legendary Improvisation
Legendary Improvisation.description:
你的即兴应变能力有了显著提升。@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.sqSpxpY0831nV1wc]{即兴精通}会在你使用自己未达到传奇熟练度（而非精通熟练度）的技能进行技能检定时触发，并在该次触发的检定中赋予你传奇熟练度，而非精通熟练度。

Your improvisation skills have dramatically improved. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.sqSpxpY0831nV1wc]{Improvised Mastery} triggers on skill checks using a skill that you don't have legendary proficiency in, rather than master proficiency, and it grants you legendary proficiency for the triggering check, rather than master proficiency.

Quantum Thesis.name: 量子论题 Quantum Thesis
Quantum Thesis.description:
你掌握着最强大的魔法，能够施放真正不可思议威能的法术。将你传统中的两个常见10环法术加入你的法术库。你获得一个单独的10环法术位，可用以施放这些法术，并使用现实巫师施法。不同于其他法术位，你不能将10环法术位用于那些给予你更多法术位的能力，或用于那些让你在不消耗法术位的情况下施放法术的能力。你不会随着升级获得更多10环法术，但你可以选取 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.MVT7iJNv6L3y2eL9]{量子研究} 专长来获得第二个法术位。

You command the most potent magic and can cast spells of truly incredible power. Add two common 10th-rank spells of your tradition to your repertoire. You gain a single 10th-rank spell slot you can use to cast these spells, using witchwarper spellcasting. Unlike with other spell slots, you can't use 10th-rank slots with abilities that give you more spell slots or that let you cast spells without expending spell slots. You don't gain more 10th-rank spells as you level up, but you can take the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.MVT7iJNv6L3y2eL9]{Quantum Research} feat to gain a second slot.

Sniper.name: 狙击手 Sniper
Sniper.description:
你擅长从远处瞄准敌人，并在不被察觉时发动攻击。无论是从墙角探身窥视、栖身于远处的屋顶，还是在小队队形的后排进行瞄准，你都偏好狙击步枪，并且更喜欢先对准完美的一击，而不是贸然冲入战斗。你受训于隐匿。你获得一个隐匿的技能专长。

弱点利用：你无视自己持用的、属于狙击组的枪械所具有的笨重和远射特征。你从以下特工专长中获得一项作为奖励专长：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.4bMox7VXPrLzKsV8]{Keep Them in Your Sights} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.rhEfisGERMwwn0qz]{Scope Sight}。

强化弱点利用：你首次使用狙击武器对你的标记目标进行的远程打击若失败，不会计入你的多重攻击减值。你每回合可以将你的狙击武器进行一次装填，作为一个自由动作。

You specialize in targeting foes from far away and attacking while unseen. Whether you're peeking around a corner, perching on a distant rooftop, or aiming from the back line of a squad formation, you favor sniper rifles and prefer to line up the perfect shot rather than rush into combat. You're trained in Stealth. You gain a skill feat for Stealth.

Exploit: You ignore the unwieldy and volley trait of guns you wield belonging to the sniper group. You gain one of the following operative feats as a bonus feat: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.4bMox7VXPrLzKsV8]{Keep Them in Your Sights} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.rhEfisGERMwwn0qz]{Scope Sight}.

Enhanced Exploit: Your first failed ranged Strike against your mark using a sniper weapon doesn't count toward your multiple attack penatly. You can Reload your sniper weapon as a free action once per turn.

Quantum Defenses.name: 量子防御 Quantum Defenses
Quantum Defenses.description:
你的施法流畅性与防御训练相结合，帮助你躲避攻击。你在轻甲和无甲防御上的熟练等级提升为专家。

The flow of your spellcasting and your defensive training combine to help you avoid attacks. Your proficiency ranks in light armor and unarmored defense increase to expert.

Solar Weapon Expertise.name: 太阳武器专精 Solar Weapon Expertise
Solar Weapon Expertise.description:
你与恒星力量的联结使你的武器变得致命。你对简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。每当你用你的太阳耀斑或太阳武器造成重击时，你获得其重击专精效果。

Your connection to stellar forces make your weapons lethal. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increase to expert. Whenever you get a critical hit with your solar flare or solar weapon, you get its critical specialization effect.

Light Armor Mastery.name: 轻甲大师 Light Armor Mastery
Light Armor Mastery.description: 你运用轻甲的技巧再次提高，提升了你闪避猛击的能力。你在轻甲以及无甲防御上的熟练度提升至大师。

Resolve.name: 决意 Resolve
Resolve.description:
特使 你以内在的决心储备强化了自己的心智。你的意志豁免熟练等级提升为大师。当你进行意志豁免检定获得成功时，你改为获得大成功。

特工 你以坚定的意志磨炼了自己的心智。你的意志豁免熟练等级提升为大师。当你进行意志豁免检定获得成功时，你改为获得大成功。

Envoy You've strengthened your mind with an inner reservoir of determination. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Operative You've steeled your mind with resolve. Your proficiency rank for Will saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Will save, you get a critical success instead.

Isolated Spell Matrix.name: 孤立法术矩阵 Isolated Spell Matrix
Isolated Spell Matrix.description:
你可以将法术直接施放进你的量子场中。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.E7HvICcH9CRAVzGc]{孤立法术矩阵} 动作。

You can cast spells directly into your quantum field. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.E7HvICcH9CRAVzGc]{Isolated Spell Matrix} action.

Wise to the Game.name: 精通游戏的人 Wise to the Game
Wise to the Game.description:
用言语影响他人正是你所擅长的，而当别人试图用同样的手段对付你时，你也很容易察觉。你对他人试图对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{佯攻} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎}，以及用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造牵制} 来分散你注意力的尝试时，其察觉DC获得+1状态加值；并且你对情绪效果的意志DC获得+1状态加值。

Using your words to influence others is what you do, and you easily recognize when others attempt to use the same tactics against you. You gain a +1 status bonus to your Perception DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie} to you and attempts to divert your attention with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}, and a +1 status bonus to your Will DC against emotion effects.

In the Spotlight.name: 聚光灯下 In the Spotlight
In the Spotlight.description:
无论是通过交谈、巧妙的谎言、令人目眩的表演，还是威胁，你都依靠魅力与狡黠来影响他人。你渴望成为众人瞩目的焦点。

领导技能 表演

领导专长 你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{令人印象深刻的表演} 作为额外专长。

领导训令 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rlhZC1VPq3XixagS]{舞伴！}

Whether through conversation, clever lies, dazzling performances, or threats, you rely on charm and cunning to influence others. You crave being in the spotlight.

Leadership Skill Performance

Leadership Perk You gain @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.xqAdXRd2gSQcqp5E]{Impressive Performance} as a bonus feat.

Leadership Directive @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.rlhZC1VPq3XixagS]{Dance Partner!}

Soldier Fighting Style.name: 士兵战斗风格 Soldier Fighting Style
Soldier Fighting Style.description:
作为一名士兵，你会以特定的战斗风格进行训练。你的风格决定了你如何应对战斗，并且常常会改变你如何利用自己压制目标的能力。选择一种士兵战斗风格。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{动作英雄}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{装甲风暴}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{轰炸}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{近距离作战}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{博学战士}

As a soldier, you train using a specific style of fighting. Your style determines how you approach combat and often changes how you take advantage of your ability to suppress targets. Choose a soldier fighting style.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{Action Hero}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{Bombard}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{Close Quarters}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{Erudite Warrior}

Galaxy Renowned.name: 银河闻名 Galaxy Renowned
Galaxy Renowned.description:
无论你走到银河系的哪里，你作为射手的名声都早已传开。你对先进枪械的熟练等级提升至传奇。你的特工职业 DC 熟练等级提升至大师。

Your reputation as a shooter precedes you wherever you go in the galaxy. Your proficiency rank increases to legendary with advanced guns. Your proficiency rank for your operative class DC increases to master.

Armor Storm.name: 护甲风暴 Armor Storm
Armor Storm.description:
你的护甲仿佛成为了你身体的一部分，能在激烈战斗中顶住猛烈火力。你的护甲能吸收更多来自被你压制的敌人所发动攻击的伤害。在战斗中，你很可能会用身体阻挡或站在前方，设法吸引敌人的怒火，并相信你的护甲能让你活下来。

你可以选择不将自己视为处于你已用其发动一次攻击的远程武器的区域内。对于来自 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} 目标所发动攻击的所有伤害，你获得等于你等级一半的抗性（最低为1）。

你无需空闲手即可执行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}。你在对被压制的敌人进行 Disarm、Grapple、Reposition、Shove 和 Trip 的 Athletics 检定上获得 +1 状态加值。当你成功对一个生物执行 Disarm、Grapple、Reposition、Shove 或 Trip 时，该生物会陷入压制状态，直到你下个回合开始。

Your armor feels like a part of you and stands up to heavy fire in the thick of battle. Your armor absorbs greater damage from attacks made by enemies you've suppressed. In a fight, you likely body block or stand in front and try to keep the enemy's ire, trusting your armor to keep you alive.

You can choose to not count as being in the area of a ranged weapon you've made an attack with. You gain resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to all damage against attacks made by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} targets.

You don't need a free hand to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}. You gain a +1 status bonus on Athletics checks to Disarm, Grapple, Reposition, Shove, and Trip suppressed foes. When you successfully Disarm, Grapple, Reposition, Shove, or Trip a creature, it becomes suppressed until the start of your next turn.

Paradox.name: 悖论 Paradox
Paradox.description:
你的存在违背了物质宇宙的现状，会引发量子涟漪，增强你的施法天赋，并打开通往其他世界的门户。也许你来自某个平行现实或不同的时间线；也许你经历过某种改变了自身道路的非自然现象，发现过一个发生时间故障的外星装置，或撰写过一篇关于量子魔法理论的论文。无论你的故事如何，你都已成为一个活生生的悖论。

在1级时，选择你的悖论。你所选的悖论决定了你法术的传统、额外获得受训的技能、你额外学会的法术，以及你的量子场的效果。你还会根据你的悖论获得专注点数和称为扭曲法术的特殊专注法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{分析者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{异常体}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{受裂隙影响者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{预知者}

Your existence is contrary to the status quo of the universe, causing quantum ripples that empower your spellcasting talent and open doorways to other worlds. Perhaps you're from an alternate reality or a different timeline, or perhaps you experienced an unnatural phenomenon that altered your path, discovered a time-glitching alien device, or wrote a treatise on quantum magical theory. Whatever your story, you've become a living paradox.

At 1st level, choose your paradox. Your chosen paradox determines the tradition of your spells, additional trained skills, additional spells you learn, and the effects of your quantum field. You also gain Focus Points and special focus spells called warp spells based on your paradox.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{Analyst}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{Anomaly}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{Gap Influenced}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{Precog}

Perception Expertise.name: 察觉专家 Perception Expertise
Perception Expertise.description:
使节 你对细节有敏锐的洞察力，并且总能对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

秘术师、士兵 你对周围的威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

巫战者 你对威胁保持警觉。你的察觉熟练等级提升为专家。

Envoy You have a keen eye for details and always manage to remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Mystic, Soldier You remain alert to threats around you. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Witchwarper You remain alert to threats. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to expert.

Weapon Mastery.name: 武器大师训练 Weapon Mastery
Weapon Mastery.description:
你像了解自己一样了解你的武器。你对简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为大师。

You know your weapons like you know yourself. Your proficiency ranks for simple and martial weapons and unarmed attacks increase to master.

Bombard.name: 轰炸 Bombard
Bombard.description:
没有什么比一把大枪（或者几把）更能帮助你渡过难关了。你已经接受了这样一个事实：你齐射中的流弹有时可能会击中盟友，但你会尽量将这种“友军误伤”的情况降到最低。你受过训练，能够在齐射时避免伤害盟友，并学会了熟练地绕开他们来布置你的攻击。

当你使用区域武器进行攻击时，你可以选择区域内数量等于你体质调整值一半的盟友。被选中的盟友不受此次攻击影响。此外，对你发动的区域攻击进行豁免时成功（但非大成功）的敌人，直到你下个回合开始前仍会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{压制}。

There's nothing like a big gun (or maybe several) to get you through tough times. You've come to terms with the fact that a stray bullet from one of your barrages might sometimes hit an ally, but you try to minimize such instances of "friendly fire." You've trained to avoid harming allies with your barrages and learned to expertly position your attacks around them.

When you attack with an area weapon, you can select a number of allies within the area equal to half your Constitution modifier. The selected allies are unaffected by the attack. In addition, enemies who succeed (but not critically succeed) on their save against an area attack you make are still @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn.

Healing.name: 治疗 Healing
Healing.description:
你与流经每颗行星上一切活物的生命力与虚无能量之泉相连。你将这些能量编织成法术，治疗你的盟友并伤害你的敌人。

传统 神圣

连接技能 医药

连接法术

  • 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{Stabilize}；
  • 1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}；
  • 2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8ViwItUgwT4lOvvb]{False Vitality}；
  • 3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kR5A0h2a9hY41wav]{Entropy Strike}；
  • 4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.s6J1Q0e28Gb42epQ]{Genetic Regeneration}；
  • 5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life}；
  • 6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6]{Vampiric Exsanguination}；
  • 7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Z9OrRXKgAPv6Hn5l]{Execute}；
  • 8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{Moment of Renewal}；
  • 9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.10VcmSYNBrvBphu1]{Massacre}

顿悟法术

  • 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d7Mj4nUQe8wg1mV7]{Infusion}；
  • 进阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zzi7LUKxKNWr5GsG]{Vitality Nova}；
  • 高阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MTulATAiOZfZNQ9d]{Vital Rebirth}

和谐 当你转移活力时，尝试消除目标身上的一个苦难，或者尝试消除一个由你选择的、使目标陷入以下任一状态的效果：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}。

完美和谐 将@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned}加入你能够通过和谐消除的状态列表。此外，如果你未能消除该效果，但若其对抗等级降低2级你本会成功消除，则改为压制该效果，直到你的下个回合开始。该效果在被压制期间，其持续时间不会流逝。

You're connected to the fount of vitality and void energy that flows through all living things on every planet. You weave these energies into spells that heal your allies and harm your enemies.

Tradition divine

Connection Skill Medicine

Connection Spells

  • cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{Stabilize};
  • 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal};
  • 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.8ViwItUgwT4lOvvb]{False Vitality};
  • 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kR5A0h2a9hY41wav]{Entropy Strike};
  • 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.s6J1Q0e28Gb42epQ]{Genetic Regeneration};
  • 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life};
  • 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.fd31tAHSSGXyOxW6]{Vampiric Exsanguination};
  • 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Z9OrRXKgAPv6Hn5l]{Execute};
  • 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{Moment of Renewal};
  • 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.10VcmSYNBrvBphu1]{Massacre}

Epiphany Spells

  • initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.d7Mj4nUQe8wg1mV7]{Infusion};
  • advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zzi7LUKxKNWr5GsG]{Vitality Nova};
  • greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.MTulATAiOZfZNQ9d]{Vital Rebirth}

Harmony When you Transfer Vitality, attempt to counteract one affliction affecting the target, or attempt to counteract one effect of your choice imposing one of the following conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}.

Perfect Harmony Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions you can counteract with your harmony. In addition, if you didn't counteract the effect, but you would've if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

Reflex Expertise.name: 反射专家 Reflex Expertise
Reflex Expertise.description:
秘术师 你的联结赐予你洞见，帮助你闪避危险。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

士兵 你已经练就了闪避危险的本领。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

织巫者 你通过惊人的分析能力或对更广阔多元宇宙的理解，察觉可能的危险，这提升了你的反应能力。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为专家。

Mystic Your connection blesses you with insight that helps you dodge danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Soldier You've developed a knack for dodging danger. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Witchwarper Your awareness of possible dangers, through incredible analysis or an understanding of the wider multiverse, increases your reflexes. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to expert.

Sharpshooter.name: 神射手 Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description:
你能看出目标的弱点，使你使用大多数类型的远程武器时能造成额外的精准伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 动作。

You can spot a target's weak points, letting you deal additional precision damage with most types of ranged weapons. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} action.

Master Spellcaster.name: 大师施法者 Master Spellcaster
Master Spellcaster.description:
秘术师 你通过自身的连接引导魔法。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为大师。

巫术扭曲者 你的法术在所有可能的世界中都属于最强大的之一。你的职业DC、法术攻击调整值和法术DC的熟练等级提升为大师。

Mystic You channel magic through your connection. Your proficiency ranks for spell attack modifiers and spell DCs increase to master.

Witchwarper Your spells are among the most potent across all possible worlds. Your proficiency ranks for class DC, spell attack modifier, and spell DC increase to master.

Magical Fortitude.name: 魔法强韧 Magical Fortitude
Magical Fortitude.description:
魔法力量增强了你身体的韧性。你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升至专家。

Magical power has improved your body's resiliency. Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to expert.

Tangible Object.name: 有形物体 Tangible Object
Tangible Object.description:
一个小物件，通常是你佩戴着的，或能用一只附肢拿住的东西，会给你带来安慰。它可能是一件有纪念意义的小饰品或衣物、一件可以拿来把玩的装置，或者只是有着你觉得令人愉悦的触感。

锚定增益 你所选物件的存在或重量帮助你扎根于这份现实之中。你在对抗幻觉和全息影像的察觉检定以及意志豁免上，均获得+1环境加值。

锚定效果 你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 状态值减少1。若你并未处于 frightened 状态，则你改为在对抗恐惧效果的意志豁免上获得+1环境加值，并且在对抗试图对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 的检定时，你的意志DC获得+2环境加值，持续至你的下个回合开始。你每轮只能从此中受益一次。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{效果：可触实物（锚定效果）}

A small object, usually something you wear or can hold with one appendage, gives you comfort. It might be a trinket or article of clothing with sentimental value, a gadget to fidget with, or perhaps it just has a texture you find pleasing.

Anchor Benefit The presence or weight of your chosen object helps ground you in this reality. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to both Perception checks and Will saves against illusions and holograms.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition by 1. If you aren't frightened, you instead gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves against fear effects and a +2 circumstance bonus to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you until the start of your next turn. You can only benefit from this once per round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{Effect: Tangible Object (Anchoring Effect)}

Operative's Edge.name: 特工优势 Operative's Edge
Operative's Edge.description:
你培养出了敏锐的觉察力与对细节的关注。你的察觉熟练等级提升至大师。此外，你在先攻检定上获得 +2 处境加值，使你在战斗中反应更快。若你习得“卓越先攻”专长，则你在先攻检定上的处境加值改为 +3。

You've developed keen awareness and attention to detail. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to master. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, making you faster to react during combat. If you take the Incredible Initiative feat, your circumstance bonus to initiative rolls becomes +3 instead.

Envoy Expertise.name: 特使专精 Envoy Expertise
Envoy Expertise.description:
你已经走了很长一段路，而你的亲身实践经验也提升了你的能力。你的特使职业 DC 的熟练等级提升为专家。

You've come a long way, and your hands-on experience has improved your skills. Your proficiency rank for your envoy class DC increases to expert.

Tough as Nails.name: 坚如钢钉 Tough as Nails
Tough as Nails.description:
你的强韧豁免熟练等级提升为大师。当你进行强韧豁免检定获得成功时，改为获得大成功。

Your proficiency rank for Fortitude saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Fortitude save, you get a critical success instead.

Anchor.name: 深扎 Anchor
Anchor.description:
无论是什么悖论改变了你存在的轨迹，总有某种东西帮助你锚定于现实。这可能是你随身携带的一件实体物品、关于家园的记忆，或你所爱之人。在1级时，选择一个锚点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{核心记忆}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{焦点}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{有形物体}

Whatever paradox altered the course of your existence, something helps keep you anchored to reality. This might be a physical object you carry, memories of your home, or loved ones. At 1st level, select an anchor.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{Core Memories}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{Focal Point}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{Tangible Object}

Gravitas.name: 威仪 Gravitas
Gravitas.description:
你通过操控引力来保护自己的身体，从而避免受到伤害。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升为大师。当你进行反射豁免并获得成功时，改为获得大成功。

You avoid harm by manipulating gravitational forces to protect your body. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.

Silver Tongue.name: 巧舌如簧 Silver Tongue
Silver Tongue.description:
你的机敏与技巧无与伦比。你的特使职业DC的熟练等级提升至大师。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MZ65QZDqa9ignWXm]{银舌}动作。

Your savvy and skill are unparalleled. Your proficiency rank for your envoy class DC increases to master. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MZ65QZDqa9ignWXm]{Silver Tongue} action.

Action Hero.name: 动作英雄 Action Hero
Action Hero.description:
你坚信，任何问题都能靠一路开火解决。不知为何，尽管逻辑往往表明情况并非如此，你的虚张声势和夸张到离谱的行动却总能奏效。对你来说，没有什么问题是成片的子弹或激光齐射解决不了的。你已经成为使用自动武器制造毁灭的专家，无论是在前线作战、在高速载具上操作炮塔，还是在敌群中一路轰杀。

当你使用自动武器成功进行一次远程@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{打击}时，你会使目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{压制}，直到你下个回合开始。此外，当你进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击}时，锥形区域的大小等于该武器的完整射程增量，而非一半。使用自动射击动作时，你可以将锥形区域内任意一名目标指定为你的主要目标，而不是离你最近的生物。

You believe that anything can be solved by shooting your way out. Somehow, your bravado and over-the-top actions have a way of working out for you, despite logic often suggesting otherwise. To you, there's no problem that a barrage of bullets or laser blasts can't fix. You've become a specialist at dealing out devastation with automatic weapons, whether you're fighting on the front line, operating a turret in a speeding vehicle, or blasting through a crowd of enemies.

When you successfully make a ranged Strike with an automatic weapon, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppress} the target until the start of your next turn. In addition, when you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}, the size of the cone is equal to the weapon's full range increment, rather than half. When using the Auto-Fire action, you can designate a target anywhere in the cone to be your primary target, rather than the creature closest to you.

Soldier Weapon Expert.name: 士兵武器专家 Soldier Weapon Expert
Soldier Weapon Expert.description:
通过实战经验，你已经学会了如何以既能粉碎敌人、又能最大限度发挥你区域攻击优势的方式使用武器。你对简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升为专家。你获得具有区域或全自动特征的武器的重击专精效果。

Through practical experience, you've learned how to use your weapons in a way that both pulverizes your foes and best takes advantage of your area attacks. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increases to expert. You gain access to the critical specialization effects of weapons with the area or automatic traits.

Incredible Senses.name: 超凡感官 Incredible Senses
Incredible Senses.description:
特使 你能注意到普通人几乎不可能察觉的事物。你在察觉上的熟练等级提升为传奇。

特工 即使没有瞄准镜，你的眼力也异常敏锐。你在察觉上的熟练等级提升为传奇。

Envoy You notice things that are almost impossible for an ordinary person to detect. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to legendary.

Operative Your eyes are incredibly sharp even without a scope. Your proficiency rank for Perception increases to legendary.

Solarian Weapon Mastery.name: 索拉里安武器精通 Solarian Weapon Mastery
Solarian Weapon Mastery.description:
你的武器成为你自身的延伸。你在简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击上的熟练等级提升至大师。

Your weapon becomes an extension of yourself. Your proficiency ranks for simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks increases to master.

Transcendence.name: 超越 Transcendence
Transcendence.description:
你是自身联结的化身，并以奇迹般的法术显现你的超越。将你所属传统中的两个常见10环法术加入你的法术 repertoire。你获得一个10环法术位，可用神秘者施法来施放这些法术。与其他法术位不同，随着你升级，你不会获得更多10环法术，而且它们不能用于那些让你在不消耗法术位的情况下施放法术的能力，或给予你更多法术位的能力。你可以选取 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.6tu2lS0CgxiDMHVO]{超越存在} 神秘者专长来获得第二个法术位。

You're an embodiment of your connection and manifest your transcendence with miraculous spells. Add two common 10th-rank spells of your tradition to your repertoire. You gain a single 10th-rank spell slot you can use to cast these spells, using mystic spellcasting. Unlike other spell slots, you don't gain more 10th-rank spells as you level up, and they can't be used for abilities that let you cast spells without expending spell slots or abilities that give you more spell slots. You can take the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.6tu2lS0CgxiDMHVO]{Transcended Existence} mystic feat to gain a second slot.

Suppressing Fire.name: 压制射击 Suppressing Fire
Suppressing Fire.description:
你擅长运用强力武器骚扰敌人并妨碍他们的移动，阻止他们发挥出最佳状态。当你进行带有区域（特征）的攻击时（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{区域射击} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击}），你会以压制目标的方式使用它。受影响区域内未能通过你此次攻击豁免的敌人，会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{压制}状态，直到你下个回合开始。处于压制状态的目标在攻击检定上承受 –1 情境减值，并且其速度承受 –10 尺状态减值。某些士兵能力和职业专长还会进一步与压制状态互动。

You have a knack for using powerful weapons to harry your foes and hinder their movement, preventing them from operating at their peak. When you make an attack with the area trait (such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}), you use it in a manner that suppresses your targets. Enemies in the affected area who fail their save against your attack become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn. A suppressed target takes a –1 circumstance penalty on attack rolls and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. Some soldier abilities and class feats interact further with the suppressed condition.

Reflex Mastery.name: 反射精通 Reflex Mastery
Reflex Mastery.description:
使节 你已经学会迅速移动以避开爆炸、龙息以及更糟的危险。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升至大师。每当你在反射豁免中掷出成功时，改为获得重度成功。

特工 你已经学会迅速移动以避开爆炸、哨戒炮塔以及更糟的危险。你的反射豁免熟练等级提升至大师。每当你在反射豁免中掷出成功时，改为获得重度成功。

Envoy You've learned to move quickly to avoid explosions, dragon's breath, and worse. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.

Operative You've learned to move quickly to avoid explosions, sentry turrets, and worse. Your proficiency rank for Reflex saves increases to master. When you roll a success on a Reflex save, you get a critical success instead.

Precog.name: 先见师 Precog
Precog.description:
某个事件让你摆脱了时间的束缚。你可能来自遥远的过去，或是遥不可及的未来。也许你从某条被遗弃的时间线穿越而来，以阻止一场灾难性的事件。无论原因是什么，你如今都被赋予了以一种少有人能理解的方式看见并操纵时间的能力。

传统 秘术

悖论技能 驾驶

悖论法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sNUvbMoMeLTnYJm8]{Injury Echo}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aEM2cttJ2eYcLssW]{Fleet Step}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.H0WECXb2wvTHT9yk]{Temporal Bullets}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.GdlG9a4o0ax0F2HT]{Time's Edge}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Ib3qxIC0bFD3ued]{Weight of Ages}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.g58dbrP7FadZhh6j]{Chrono Push}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0XP2XOxT9VSiXFDr]{Phantasmal Calamity}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{True Target}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{Moment of Renewal}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

扭曲法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1gkdgFwKfAoQx163]{Warp Time}；进阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RDvWFbAaXtxrhJMD]{Accelerate}；高阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HzFdtjvRCFpb0NrS]{Time Loop}

量子场 你对环绕自身的时间流动拥有些许控制力。位于你的量子场内并使用移动动作的敌方生物，在该动作期间其速度受到 –5英尺的状态减值。你和你的盟友在你的量子场内使用移动动作时，其速度获得 +5英尺的状态加值。

Some event has unstuck you in time. You might come from the distant past or a far-flung future. Perhaps you've traveled from some forsaken timeline to stop a cataclysmic event. Whatever the reason, you're now gifted with the ability to see and manipulate time in a way that few others comprehend.

Tradition occult

Paradox Skill Piloting

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.sNUvbMoMeLTnYJm8]{Injury Echo}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aEM2cttJ2eYcLssW]{Fleet Step}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.H0WECXb2wvTHT9yk]{Temporal Bullets}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.GdlG9a4o0ax0F2HT]{Time's Edge}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.7Ib3qxIC0bFD3ued]{Weight of Ages}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.g58dbrP7FadZhh6j]{Chrono Push}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.0XP2XOxT9VSiXFDr]{Phantasmal Calamity}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.AlbpWWN87yGegoAF]{True Target}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4MOew29Z1oCX8O28]{Moment of Renewal}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.1gkdgFwKfAoQx163]{Warp Time}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.RDvWFbAaXtxrhJMD]{Accelerate}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HzFdtjvRCFpb0NrS]{Time Loop}

Quantum Field You have a modicum of control of the temporal flow that surrounds you. An enemy creature that uses a move action inside your quantum field takes a –5-foot status penalty to its Speed during that action. You and your allies gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed during move actions that are used inside your quantum field.

Legendary Gunner.name: 传奇炮手 Legendary Gunner
Legendary Gunner.description:
你是本地的传奇人物，以精通武器而闻名。你使用简易枪械和军用枪械的熟练等级提升至传奇，使用先进枪械的熟练等级提升至大师。你使用简易武器、军用武器和徒手攻击的熟练等级提升至专家。

You're a local legend who's known for your prowess with weaponry. Your proficiency rank increases to legendary with simple and martial guns, and to master with advanced guns. Your proficiency rank increases to expert with simple weapons, martial weapons, and unarmed attacks.

Envoy Directives.name: 特使训令 Envoy Directives
Envoy Directives.description:
使者通过训令来鼓舞盟友。训令是一种命令，遵从它的盟友会因此获益。使者训令还包含一种使者通过花费更多动作来以身作则、从而增强效果的方式。训令具有听觉或视觉特征，具体取决于你如何激励你的盟友。

你起始时拥有一项使者训令。你可以通过使者职业、使者职业专长和你的领导风格学习更多训令。你每轮可以发布一项训令。除非另有说明，使者的训令及其赋予的增益会持续到你下个回合开始时。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{狠狠干！} 使者训令。

Envoys encourage their allies with directives. A directive is an order that benefits allies who follow it. Envoy directives include a way for the envoy to lead by example by spending more actions for increased effects. Directives have the auditory or visual trait depending on how you inspire your allies.

You begin with one envoy directive. You can learn more directives through the envoy class, envoy class feats, and your leadership style. You can issue one directive a round. Unless otherwise stated, an envoy's directive and the benefits it grants last until the beginning of your next turn.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cmCtfURzpbzkxWsy]{Get 'Em!} envoy directive.

Akashic.name: 阿卡西记录 Akashic
Akashic.description:
你与阿卡西记录——这一储存着多元宇宙一切知识的超自然宝库——维持着永久的心灵链接。这个连接使你能够获取那些原本会超出普通凡人心智所能掌握范围的知识。

传统 occult

连接技能 神秘学

连接法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.nf8q0zvJDnnkzANe]{Scan Environment}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{Akashic Download}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kTzbLqmqPcZwOa5F]{Wave of Warning}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.f98vwzcdxafum8ln]{Akashic Revival}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

顿悟法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mAu69GVbFKYzQM5a]{Akashic Fount}；先进：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.z0Spgrf92nmaqjCW]{Akashic Assistant}；强效：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CjVOXjuvvTJqC7AD]{Data Drain}

和谐 当你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}时，目标会从阿卡西记录中接收一次心灵下载，并且可以立刻以反应尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}。这不会触发任何在生物使用“回忆知识”时触发的特殊能力、反应或自由动作。

完美和谐 你创造出一座异次元记忆宫殿，其效果等同于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vPWMEyVTreMOoFnm]{Planar Palace}。创造一扇通往该半位面的门需要1分钟。每次你进入这座记忆宫殿时，它都会保持相同的布局，并可在每日准备期间进行调整。你记忆宫殿中的每个幻象仆从都如同阿卡西助手一般运作（就像由akashic assistant顿悟法术创造出的那些一样）。

You maintain a permanent psychic link to the Akashic Record, the supernatural repository of all knowledge in the multiverse. This connection allows you to access knowledge that otherwise would remain beyond the grasp of regular mortal minds.

Tradition occult

Connection Skill Occultism

Connection Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.nf8q0zvJDnnkzANe]{Scan Environment}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{Akashic Download}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mnoTqz0gjRmuc4oR]{Instant Virus}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kTzbLqmqPcZwOa5F]{Wave of Warning}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zdzeVZlKHkMAt2Rf]{Death Sentence}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.f98vwzcdxafum8ln]{Akashic Revival}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

Epiphany Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.mAu69GVbFKYzQM5a]{Akashic Fount}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.z0Spgrf92nmaqjCW]{Akashic Assistant}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CjVOXjuvvTJqC7AD]{Data Drain}

Harmony When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.UeMHbnnaXDa3sGfG]{Transfer Vitality}, the target receives a psychic download from the Akashic Record and can immediately attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} as a reaction. This doesn't trigger any special abilities, reactions, or free actions that trigger when a creature uses Recall Knowledge.

Perfect Harmony You create an extradimensional memory palace that functions as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vPWMEyVTreMOoFnm]{Planar Palace}. Creating a door to the demiplane takes 1 minute. The memory palace keeps the same layout each time you access it, adjustable during daily preparations. Each phantasmal minion in your memory palace functions as an akashic assistant (like those created by the akashic assistant epiphany spell).

Focused.name: 专注 Focused
Focused.description:
你高度专注于你的目标，并能够辨明其行动。当你针对你的猎物进行反射或意志豁免检定并获得成功时，你改为获得严重成功。

You're highly focused on your target and able to discern their moves. When you roll a success on a Reflex or Will save against your mark, you get a critical success instead.

Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: 幻巫施法 Witchwarper Spellcasting
Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
你的悖论赋予你魔法力量。你可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为扭巫者，当你施放法术时，你可能会大声描述自己对其他现实的揭示，同时辅以优雅的手势，周围燃起奥术方程或神秘学符号。

每天，你最多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过法术 repertory 职业特性来习得它们。你每天能够施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。
